extend the ForgeKind enum and factory/dispatch function in config.rs to detect and instantiate the right provider; extend SecretStore to resolve PAT/token types per provider; add wiremock-based integration tests mirroring github_test.rs for each new provider","pros":["Follows established, already-reviewed pattern from PR #736, minimizing review friction","Keeps SecurityScanner and downstream consumers untouched since they depend only on dyn Forge","Each provider is isolated, easy to test and maintain independently","Incremental: providers can be shipped and merged one at a time"],"cons":["Some duplication of pagination/retry/error-mapping boilerplate across four provider modules unless factored into a shared helper","Requires careful mapping of each API's differing pagination and rate-limit semantics into the common trait shape","No mature Rust SDKs for GitLab/Gitea/Azure DevOps to lean on, so more manual REST/DTO work than the GitHub case"],"complexity":"medium","files_touched":9}
